title: Hero Panorama of Alpine Timber Chalet
prompt: Hero exterior panorama of a refined Swiss chalet set against a dramatic alpine valley. Shot with Canon EOS R5, 24mm tilt-shift lens, f/8, ISO 100, 1/125s. Camera height 1.6 m (eye level), slight downward tilt to show roofline and terraces. Early morning golden hour, light from the east/left casting warm striated highlights across timber facades and snow‑capped ridges. Composition: wide horizontal framing, foreground: frosted meadow and stone path leading to the chalet; midground: chalet massing with layered balconies and glass balustrades; background: alpine peaks and blue sky. Materials and textures: deep oiled spruce cladding, charred blackened cedar overhangs, natural stone plinth, large glazed panes with slim frames, wool blankets on balconies. Environmental details: soft mist in the valley, crisp snow patches, conifer silhouettes. Mood: editorial, warm timber tones, high realism suitable for architectural precedent and marketing. Color palette: warm ochres, deep wood browns, cool alpine blues. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Hero panorama of a timber Swiss chalet framed by alpine peaks at golden hour.
description: Wide hero view of a timber Swiss chalet in an alpine valley at morning golden hour, emphasizing massing, materials, and mountain framing for marketing and precedent use.

title: Arrival Approach Along a Snowed Path
prompt: Arrival shot down a gently curving snowed approach toward a chalet entrance. Photographed with Nikon Z7 II, 35mm lens, f/4, ISO 200, 1/160s. Camera height 1.8 m, low-perspective to accentuate path and overhanging eaves, slight upward angle toward entrance. Late morning with soft north-eastern light filtered through thin clouds, light direction left-front to create soft shadows under eaves. Composition: vertical framing, foreground: salted stone steps and lanterns, midground: porte-cochère and carved timber columns, background: framed glimpses of the mountain. Materials: warm knotty pine siding, hand-hewn stone, brass lanterns, matte black metal roof. Styling: subtle staging — one person in a wool coat carrying skis for scale and context (no lifestyle focus). Environmental details: light snow dusting, footprints, smoke wisping from chimney. Mood: approachable luxury, tactile warmth, photorealistic. Color palette: muted creams, deep wood, charcoal. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Portrait arrival along a snowed approach to a timber chalet entrance with a person for scale.
description: Vertical arrival view down a snowed approach to a chalet entrance, showing materiality, scale and welcoming composition with a single person for context.

title: Elevated Context: Chalet in Mountain Panorama
prompt: Elevated context view showing the chalet perched on a slope within a sweeping alpine panorama. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 70–200mm at 100mm, f/11, ISO 100, 1/200s. Camera placed on a tripod at 2.0 m elevation from an overlook, eye-to-roofline angle to capture site relationship. Midday with clear light from the south-west, sun grazing facades creating long compositional shadows toward foreground. Composition: cinematic horizontal, foreground: branched pines and terraced gardens, midground: chalet and adjoining guest lodges, background: layered mountain ranges and glaciers. Materials and textures rendered: warm vertical timber, stone retaining walls, glass volumes reflecting sky. Environmental details: winding access road, mountain pasture, alpine lodge cluster for scale. Mood: authoritative and documentary, crisp realism for site analysis and resort marketing. Color palette: neutral stone greys, warm timber, alpine greens and blues. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Elevated panoramic view of a Swiss chalet cluster framed by layered mountain ranges and alpine pasture.
description: Elevated panorama locating the chalet in its alpine context, ideal for site studies and resort marketing that require clear spatial relationships and material contrast.

title: Twilight Glow with Warm Interior Firelight
prompt: Dusk twilight exterior of the chalet with interior warmth spilling onto snowed terraces. Captured on Canon EOS R3, 35mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 400, 1/30s handheld with stabilization — slight motion blur allowed for atmosphere. Camera height 1.4 m, eye level, straight-on composition. Time: blue hour just after sunset, main light source: warm interior lighting and fireplace glow from left-front, secondary ambient cool residual sky light from rear. Composition: horizontal, foreground: reflective wet stone terrace with pooled light, midground: glazed living room revealing layered wool textiles and hearth, background: silhouette of dark pines and distant peaks. Materials: ribbed wool throws, leather armchairs, polished stone hearth, timber beams, smoked glass. Styling: interiors staged with low coffee table, sculptural vase, pendant lights. Mood: intimate, cinematic hospitality, high photorealism for marketing. Color palette: deep indigo blues, amber and ember tones. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Dusk exterior of a Swiss chalet with warm interior and fireplace glow spilling onto a snowy terrace.
description: Twilight exterior featuring warm interior firelight and layered textiles visible through glazing, conveying hospitality and cozy evening atmosphere for marketing.

title: Fireplace Lounge with Layered Wool Textiles
prompt: Styled semi-interior living composition focused on a double-height fireplace lounge. Shot with Nikon D850, 50mm prime, f/1.8, ISO 200, 1/125s. Camera at 1.2 m height, slight inward angle to include hearth, ceiling beams and balcony above. Time: afternoon with soft sidelighting from left glazing, fill by warm recessed lights. Composition: vertical frame, foreground: stone coffee table with sculptural vase and stacked books, midground: low-profile sectional upholstered in natural felt wool, layered wool throws and kilim rug, hearth with visible flame, background: timber staircase and gallery. Furniture & styling: leather club chair, brass side tables, handmade ceramic objects, framed landscape painting, pendant chandelier of aged brass. Materials & textures: brushed oak floors, honed stone hearth, raw-sawn timber beams, woven textiles. Mood: tactile, refined alpine luxury, hyper-real photorealism suitable for interior precedent and marketing. Color palette: soft neutrals, warm browns, charcoal accents. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Portrait living room with double-height fireplace, wool textiles, and timber beams in chalet lounge.
description: Vertical interior of a luxury chalet lounge centered on a double-height fireplace, layered wool textiles, and warm timber for hospitality-focused presentations.

title: Sculptural Vignette: Rug, Vase and Pendant Light
prompt: Square luxury vignette of a contemplative styling cluster: stone coffee table, sculptural vase, artisanal rug and a statement pendant. Photographed with Fujifilm GFX100, 80mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 100, 1/60s. Camera height 0.9 m, slightly overhead to emphasize textures and layers. Time: morning with soft diffused north light from left and warm accent light from a nearby floor lamp. Composition: tight square crop, foreground: hand-knotted wool rug with geometric pattern; midground: low stone table with matte ceramic vase and a folded wool throw; background: blurred timber paneled wall and brass pendant. Materials & textures: raw stone, hand-loomed wool, matte ceramics, aged brass. Styling objects: small tray with pine sprig, design monograph, tactile ceramics. Mood: quiet, curated, gallery-like realism for product and interior styling references. Color palette: warm oatmeal, terracotta, muted gold. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Square vignette of a stone coffee table, sculptural vase, hand-loomed rug and pendant light in chalet styling.
description: Curated square vignette focusing on rug, vase and pendant light to illustrate high-end material layering and styling for interior boards.

title: Weather Study: Snow Drift and Low Clouds
prompt: Mood-driven weather study showing the chalet under a soft snow drift and low cloud cover. Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV, 85mm lens, f/5.6, ISO 200, 1/250s. Camera positioned at 1.7 m on a slight rise to look across roof planes. Time: overcast late afternoon, diffuse light from high cloud creating even soft shadows; wind direction from right to left indicated by drifting snow. Composition: wide cinematic frame, foreground: wind-swept snowbanks and exposed stone steps, midground: chalet rooflines accented with snow cornices, background: obscured mountain silhouettes fading into cloud. Materials and textures emphasized: saturated wet timber, snow-laden eaves, steamed glass. Environmental details: falling snow motion, frosted glass, muted color contrast. Mood: moody, atmospheric, documentary-level realism for climate resilience studies and marketing evocative moods. Color palette: cool greys, slate blues and warm wood undertones. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Cinematic weather study of a chalet under drifting snow and low cloud cover, emphasizing atmosphere.
description: Snowstorm and low-cloud study framing the chalet in moody conditions, useful for resilience studies and evocative resort marketing.

title: Terrace Spa with Heated Infinity Pool Overlooking Peaks
prompt: Square amenity shot of a heated terrace spa and infinity pool that overlooks alpine peaks. Captured with Leica SL2, 28mm lens, f/4, ISO 200, 1/125s. Camera mounted at 1.1 m on a low tripod for a grounded perspective across pool edge. Time: late afternoon with back-left sunlight illuminating steam rising from the pool and highlighting timber louvers. Composition: square balance, foreground: textured stone pool edge and wet patina, midground: infinity water plane reflecting sky and timber pergola with integrated louvers, background: layered mountain horizon. Materials: honed basalt pool coping, brass decking drains, oiled timber pergola, heated lounge beds with wool throws and teak side tables. Styling: minimal towels, ceramic cups, recessed ambient lighting. Mood: serene, refined hospitality, photorealistic, usable for marketing amenity pages and resort brochures. Color palette: cool slate, warm timber, soft steam whites. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Square view of a heated infinity pool terrace at a chalet, steam rising and peaks beyond for amenity marketing.
description: Amenity-focused square shot of a heated infinity pool terrace with timber pergola and mountain views, perfect for resort marketing and hospitality boards.
